content.en:
The years that followed.

Ye Tian has traveled all over the Liujin Continent, and he has also obtained a lot of resources, and his strength is steadily improving.

Of course, he still didn't copy his real body, because it would be too dangerous to do that.

It hadn't been long since that incident had passed, and he didn't want to cause the Infinite Heavenly Palace to hunt him down.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's copy body had already cultivated to the Nine Awakening Origin Origin Upper Realm Overlord Realm, in terms of cultivation, it was indeed higher than the real body copy body, but the difference in strength was too great.

At this time, Ye Tian had already thought of how to obtain the Supreme Dao Secret Technique.

"Join the small forces!"

Ye Tian decided.

If you want to join the big forces, people definitely don't want to, but if you want to join the small forces, the requirements are lower, and there is a possibility of joining.

And after his continuous screening, a small force was also chosen.

【True River Valley】

This small force only has thirteen Supreme Dao Realm existences, and more than 10,000 Origin Upper Realm Overlords, such a force is undoubtedly very inconspicuous in the entire Infinite Domain, I am afraid that many Origin Upper Realm Overlords have never heard of it.

Ye Tian knew about this force, and he only knew about it by chance.

The reason why Ye Tian wanted to join the True River Valley was because the conditions for recruiting members in the True River Valley were very relaxed, as long as he was willing to enter the True Pole Land without dying, and found the materials needed by the True River Valley, he could join the True River Valley.

Many Scattered Cultivation Origin Upper Realm Overlords will take a risk, after all, if they join the True River Valley, they can at least obtain the Supreme Dao Realm inheritance, then there is hope to become the Supreme Dao Realm, this is also a hope.

......

The True River Valley is still a little far away from the Liujin Continent, and even the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm of the Nine Awakenings needs to travel through the void to reach here.

True River City.

This is the place to sign up for the task of the True River Valley, and after Ye Tian came here, he quickly took over the task of breaking into the True Extreme.

The True Pole Land is very dangerous, and there is a high probability that the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords will fall.

Many of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords were cooperating with each other, so they were sure to come out alive.

Ye Tian naturally acted alone.

I saw that Ye Tian received a map, which recorded all kinds of materials needed in the True River Valley, if he could find a hundred materials, regardless of the type, he could join the True River Valley.

Of course, if you don't want to join the True River Valley, you can exchange it for a large number of Dao Coins.

The True Body.

Ye Tian entered, and this place was like another void, surrounded by red mist.

According to the information given by the True River Valley, the real danger in the True Pole Land is a very terrifying creature - the True Pole Dao Insect, this kind of insect is very strange, and it contains the breath of the Supreme Dao Rules, as if the body is composed of the Supreme Dao Rules, although the number is not much, but the speed is extremely fast, and it can also shuttle through the True Pole Land at will.

The general Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords encounter True Extreme Dao Worms, they can't be defeated at all, and they are easy to be killed, and a few of them can be called the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords invincible, and they can instantly kill the top Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

Because of this, True River Valley didn't dare to let its members enter here to take risks, and let other Origin Upper Realm Overlords take risks at a small cost, even if they fell, it would have no impact on True River Valley.

"Let's copy a few more holes and copy the body!"

Ye Tian decided.

That way, it would be easier for him to collect all those materials.

Soon, three replicas were made.

"Enough!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently, the three replicant bodies moved separately.

......

Ye Tian continued to go deeper, looking for those materials, only by going deep could he hope to find them, if he stayed on the periphery, the possibility of finding them was too low.

However, not long after he went deeper, he was unlucky enough to encounter a true extreme dao worm.

Rumble!!!!

The True Extreme Dao Worm passed through the void and killed Ye Tian directly.

I saw that it was full of the power of the Supreme Dao Rules, and there was a single thorn on its head, as if it could penetrate all matter.

Bang!!!!

Ye Tian's Quasi-Dao Weapon spear stabbed the True Extreme Dao Worm and only knocked it away, but it didn't kill it instantly.

However, this True Extreme Dao Worm was still injured, and its shell cracked a lot, but it was not a fatal injury.

"It's really very powerful, the strength of this True Extreme Dao Worm is really not weak, it can kill a lot of Nine Awakening Origin Origin Upper Realm Overlords in seconds, even if it is the kind of Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm that is very strong and the top Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm, it has to be united by more than a dozen people to be able to compete with it!" Ye Tian thought.

However, Ye Tian has not yet exerted his full strength, if he exerts his full strength, he will still be able to kill this True Extreme Dao Insect.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian continued to fight with him, and soon hit him hard.

However, this True Extreme Dao Worm ran away, and its escape ability was so strong that Ye Tian couldn't catch up.

"This replica body is still too weak!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently, he continued to search for materials.

It didn't take long for him to see a material that the True River Valley needed—the Dao Stone!

This is a gray stone that contains the power of the supreme rules, the exterior is crystal clear, and the interior seems to have a gray river.

"This kind of Supreme Dao Stone is good, it can make people understand the rules of the Supreme Dao!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But such a small stone, if it is used to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Path, it will definitely not be of much help, and its real use should not be like this.

As for the specific use, he did not know.

"I've finally found one, keep looking!"

Ye Tian continued to search.

As time passed, he found one material after another, but he was also attacked again and again by the Supreme Dao True Pole Worm.

And once, he encountered a weaker Supreme Dao True Pole Worm and killed it directly, which was also the only Supreme Dao True Pole Worm he killed.

Subsequently, he collected the corpse of the Supreme Dao True Pole Worm.

After a period of time, Ye Tian had already gathered a hundred materials, and then he chose to leave.

For him, joining True River Valley first is the most important thing.

As for the true power of many resources and treasures, you can come at any time in the future!

......

True River City.

Ye Tianlai submitted the task, and the Overlord of the True River Valley Origin Upper Realm who was in charge of this mission immediately passed the news to the True River Valley.

And Ye Tian's choice was to join the True River Valley, and the joining procedures were quickly handled.

In this way, Ye Tian easily joined the True River Valley.

Of course.

True River Valley will also investigate Ye Tian's identity, and if his identity is unknown, they won't ask for it.

And the identity of Ye Tian's cave light copy body is easy to find, although the cultivation is a little fast, it can be explained by chance, and it will not arouse suspicion.

It didn't take long for True River Valley to agree, making Ye Tian officially a member of True River Valley.
